7280.title: Written In Blood
7280.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

7281.title: Judge Judy
7281.description: A woman fights with her ex-boyfriend over an oven.

7282.title: Cheaters
7282.description: Tony's suspicions are aroused when wife Becky misses their first wedding anniversary. David is worried about the lack of intimacy between him and wife Kim.

7283.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7283.description: A look at the life of the notorious murderer, who broke into a home and took the lives of three family members in a senseless killing.

7284.title: Judge Judy
7284.description: Neighbours accuse each other of child abuse and harassment. Then, a woman says her sister stole her TV while she was in jail.

7285.title: Judge Judy
7285.description: A disabled veteran, who says that a pit bull attacked his service dog, sues the owner for damages.

7286.title: Judge Judy
7286.description: A landlord says the police raided his property because of a tenant's teen parties. Then, a woman sues her ex and his mother for medical bills.

7287.title: Something's Killing Me
7287.description: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they - what causes them? And are they real?

7288.title: Operation Repo
7288.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7289.title: Operation Repo
7289.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7290.title: Judge Judy
7290.description: Glasses are broken during a drinking game. Then, a mother of two toddlers sues a caretaker for the return of pre-paid baby-sitting fees.

7291.title: Judge Judy
7291.description: Ex-friends argue over rent and utilities. Then, a former couple fight over accusations of assault and the return of a laptop.

7292.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7292.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

7293.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7293.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

7294.title: Close Calls On Camera
7294.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

7295.title: Operation Repo
7295.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7296.title: Operation Repo
7296.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7297.title: Haunted Case Files
7297.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.

7298.title: Judge Judy
7298.description: A plaintiff says her son's fiancee destroyed her belongings and failed to pay rent. A woman wants her child's father to repay her for an amusement park pass. A defendant says he had no choice but to kick down his sister's door.

7299.title: Judge Judy
7299.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

7300.title: Judge Judy
7300.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

7301.title: Operation Repo
7301.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7302.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7302.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

7303.title: The Day I Should Have Died
7303.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

7304.title: Close Calls On Camera
7304.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

7305.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7305.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

7306.title: Judge Judy
7306.description: A pregnant teen is sued for medical bills and property damage after she assaults another teen; a man sues former residents for leaving his duplex a mess.

7307.title: Judge Judy
7307.description: Men fight over damages after one punches the other; a former friend sues a teen for repayment of a loan.

7308.title: Haunted Case Files
7308.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.

7309.title: Operation Repo
7309.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7314.title: Judge Judy
7314.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

7315.title: Judge Judy
7315.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

7316.title: The Day I Should Have Died
7316.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

7317.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7317.description: Robert Benjamin Rhoades, also known as The Truck Stop Killer, is an American serial killer and rapist. He was convicted for three murders, but it is estimated that he is responsible for dozens more.

7318.title: Cheaters
7318.description: Robley frets when his wife starts going out with her friends every night; Sharon and Jerome have six kids between them, but he doesn't want to play happy families.

7319.title: Wives With Knives
7319.description: Karen Miller's new romance with a co-worker is fuelled by alcohol and abuse, then she is forced to defend herself against him by plunging a knife into his neck.

7320.title: Paranormal Survivor
7320.description: A couple begins to witness spine-chilling apparitions in their apartment. A young woman has terrifying recurring dreams that tragically come true.
